title: Emergency Relief & Disaster Response
subtitle: Immediate aid in crisis
description: UHR provides immediate assistance to communities affected by conflict, natural disasters, and other crises. We deliver customized food parcels, clean water, shelter materials, medical supplies, and essential non-food items to help families survive and recover.

hero.title: Emergency Relief & Disaster Response
hero.heading: Immediate Aid
hero.overlayText: Providing lifesaving aid to families in crisis.

props.title: Immediate Aid
props.content: UHR provides immediate assistance to communities affected by conflict, natural disasters, and other crises. We deliver customized food parcels, clean water, shelter materials, medical supplies, and essential non-food items to help families survive and recover.

props.title: Bring Hope and Relief in The Face Of Disaster

content.paragraph: After years of civil war, people continue to face significant challenges. Millions of people need humanitarian assistance. Many live in overcrowded camps where there is little food or clean water.
Illness and other health risks can spread quickly in crisis conditions. People urgently need basic essentials to protect themselves and stay well during this critical time.
Help us support vulnerable families so they don’t have to choose between having food to eat and staying safe. Provide a displaced family with a food parcel to help them eat well for a whole month.

props.title: Food Parcels Distribution for Palestinian Refugees
props.content: Providing essential food parcels to Palestinian refugees affected by conflict and displacement.

props.title: Project Reports
props.content: Engages in humanitarian projects both locally and internationally to assist those in dire need of assistance. It is our goal to empower individuals and families within their communities.

props.title: Help Change Lives Today
props.content: Your support allows UHR to deliver lifesaving aid and long-term solutions to communities in need.

title: Food Security
subtitle: Hunger Relief
description: UHR combats hunger and malnutrition through regular food distributions and nutritional support for families. UHR promotes long-term food sustainability to strengthen community resilience.

hero.title: Food Security
hero.heading: Feeding Families In Need
hero.overlayText: Ensuring every family has access to nutritious food and a healthier future.

props.title: Feeding Families In Need
props.content: UHR combats hunger and malnutrition through regular food distributions and nutritional support for families. UHR promotes long-term food sustainability to strengthen community resilience.

stats.label: People around the world face chronic malnutrition.
People go to bed hungry every night.
People face hunger due to crises and conflicts.

initiatives.title: Baby Formula Program
initiatives.description: This initiative provides life-saving baby formula to infants who have lost access to breast milk or safe food due to displacement or conflict.

initiatives.title: Monthly Food Parcels
initiatives.description: Our teams and partners deliver essential food parcels to families living in extreme poverty and refugee communities.

initiatives.title: Fighting Hunger in Emergencies
initiatives.description: During humanitarian crises, we distribute emergency food packages including vegetable bags, flour bags, bread, and meat supplies to families affected by disasters, conflict, and displacement.

initiatives.title: Community Kitchens (Tikkiyat)
initiatives.description: Our community kitchens provide daily hot meals to displaced families. These kitchens operate in safe locations such as schools and shelters, delivering nutritious dishes including rice, beans, lentils, soups, chicken, and bulgur.

props.title: Bringing Warm Meals and Hope
props.content: Through six active community kitchens, thousands of displaced families receive warm meals every day. These kitchens have become an essential lifeline for families facing severe food insecurity.

props.title: Help Change Lives Today
props.content: Your support allows UHR to deliver lifesaving aid and long-term solutions to communities in need.

title: Water, Sanitation & Hygiene (WASH)
subtitle: Access to Clean Water & Hygiene
tagline: Donate Clean Water Through our Water Aid Projects
description: UHR ensures access to safe water and improved sanitation facilities. We conduct hygiene promotion campaigns to reduce the spread of waterborne diseases and improve community health.

hero.title: Water, Sanitation & Hygiene (WASH)
hero.heading: Donate Clean Water Through our Water Aid Projects
hero.overlayText: Ensuring every family has access to clean water and dignified sanitation.

props.title: Donate Clean Water Through our Water Aid Projects
props.content: UHR ensures access to safe water and improved sanitation facilities. We conduct hygiene promotion campaigns to reduce the spread of waterborne diseases and improve community health.

stats.label: An estimated 3.6 billion people lack access to clean drinking water (more than 35% of the world’s population).
Worldwide, 780 million people do not have access to an improved water source.
Every 2 minutes a child dies from a water-related disease.
Children spend up to five hours a day fetching water, taking time away from school.

props.title: Access to Clean Water Improves Life!

content.description: Children no longer spend hours each day collecting water—so they can return to school.
Safe water supports crops, helps sustain livestock, and strengthens household stability.
Clean water and hygiene go hand in hand. Safe water reduces disease risk and helps families stay well and productive.
With fewer illnesses and less time spent fetching water, families can work more consistently and move toward long-term stability.
Reliable water access helps communities build safer, healthier futures.

initiatives.title: Water Wells Construction
initiatives.description: UHR facilitates the digging of water wells in isolated communities affected by water crises. Each well provides over 16,000 people with access to safe clean water.

initiatives.title: Water Trucking in Gaza and East Africa
initiatives.description: This project delivers safe, clean water by truck to families in Gaza and East Africa who have lost access to reliable water sources due to conflict, drought, or damaged infrastructure.

initiatives.title: Water Purification Units and Solar Panels
initiatives.description: Through UHR’s Build A Water Well program, you can provide safe clean water for vulnerable communities to drink, maintain their hygiene, irrigate their crops, and keep their livestock hydrated.

initiatives.title: Sanitation Facilities Construction/Public Bathrooms in East Africa
initiatives.description: This project builds and maintains safe, dignified public bathrooms and sanitation facilities in underserved communities across East Africa.

props.title: Help Change Lives Today
props.content: Your support allows UHR to deliver lifesaving aid and long-term solutions to communities in need.

title: Health
subtitle: Restoring Health & Medical Support
tagline: Quality healthcare is vital to fight poverty
description: UHR sends shipments of medical supplies to countries in crisis, ensuring that families in need can access essential treatment. UHR helps underserved communities receive healthcare and provides medical equipment to hospitals to strengthen local health services.

hero.title: Health
hero.heading: Quality Healthcare is Vital to Fight Poverty
hero.overlayText: Ensuring families in crisis can access essential medical treatment and healthcare services.

props.title: Quality Healthcare is Vital to Fight Poverty
props.content: UHR sends shipments of medical supplies to countries in crisis, ensuring that families in need can access essential treatment. UHR helps underserved communities receive healthcare and provides medical equipment to hospitals to strengthen local health services.

stats.label: Children die from preventable diseases every year
Cataract is the leading cause of blindness and visual impairment in the world (WHO)
Children suffer from TB and quarter a million die from it yearly

initiatives.title: Emergency Medical Kits Shipments
initiatives.description: Each kit includes pain medication, gauze, surgical instruments, gloves, masks, sterilizers and more.

initiatives.title: Cataract Eye Surgeries
initiatives.description: Medical missions facilitated to perform surgeries in East Africa, Jordan and Egypt.

initiatives.title: ENT Surgeries for Children
initiatives.description: To facilitate early detection of sensory impairments, UHR arranges for vision & hearing screening days for children in need to identify any sensory difficulties early on in life.

initiatives.title: Cleft Lip Surgeries
initiatives.description: Cleft lip surgeries restore a child’s ability to eat, speak, and smile with confidence. Your support helps provide safe, life-changing operations that repair facial deformities, relieve pain and social stigma, and give children a brighter future.

initiatives.title: Medical Supplies & Equipment
initiatives.description: UHR delivers multiple shipments yearly and distributes millions of dollars worth of medicines for chronic conditions, hospital equipment, wheelchairs, over-the-counter drugs, and health care supplies in communities where they are not readily available.

props.title: Help Change Lives Today
props.content: Your support allows UHR to deliver lifesaving medical aid and long-term healthcare solutions to communities in need.

title: Shelter
subtitle: Providing Safe Durable Housing
tagline: Shelter and Stability for Displaced Families
description: UHR provides safe, dignified, and protective shelter for displaced families and vulnerable communities affected by conflict, disasters, and other crises.

hero.title: Shelter
hero.heading: Shelter and Stability for Displaced Families
hero.overlayText: Providing safe, dignified, and protective shelter for displaced families and vulnerable communities.

props.title: Shelter and Stability for Displaced Families
props.content: UHR provides safe, dignified, and protective shelter for displaced families and vulnerable communities affected by conflict, disasters, and other crises.

props.title: A Safe Place to Start Again

content.paragraph: This project will establish a 100-tent camp in Gaza, designed to provide safe, dignified, and durable shelter for families in need.
Each tent will be installed on a concrete flooring layout and fully equipped with bedding, eating utensils, and cooking pots to meet essential daily needs.
We invite you to support this life-saving shelter program. Your contribution will directly help families rebuild their lives and offer them a secure environment where they can begin again.

props.title: Shelter Projects
props.description: UHR provides various types of shelter solutions to meet the diverse needs of displaced families:

items.title: Emergency Tents
items.description: Immediate shelter solutions for families in crisis situations.

items.title: Transitional Housing
items.description: Temporary housing solutions that bridge the gap between emergency shelter and permanent housing.

items.title: Repairs or Reconstruction
items.description: For damaged homes to help families regain stability, security, and a sense of normalcy.

items.title: Aid to IDPs
items.description: United Hands Relief delivers emergency assistance to the internally displaced. Assistance packages include winterization kits, non-food items (NFIs), and tents.

pastAchievements.achievement: Over 50 homes renovated in Gaza prior to the 2023 war, repairing damage from conflict or disaster
500 weatherproof tents sent to Gaza to support displaced families

props.title: Project Costs
props.description: Your support can help another family find safety, warmth, and hope.
props.cta: Join us in rebuilding lives—one home at a time.

costs.item: Providing a complete tent shelter (with tarps and waterproofing)

props.title: Help Provide Shelter Today
props.content: Your support allows UHR to deliver lifesaving shelter solutions and long-term housing stability to families in need.

title: Child Protection & Widow Family Assistance
subtitle: Safeguarding Vulnerable Children
description: UHR supports orphaned and vulnerable children with education, healthcare, nutrition, and psychosocial care. UHR works to ensure every child grows in a safe and nurturing environment.

hero.title: Child Protection & Widow Family Assistance
hero.heading: Protecting Children, Empowering Families
hero.overlayText: Supporting orphaned and vulnerable children with education, healthcare, and psychosocial care.

props.title: Protecting Children, Empowering Families
props.content: UHR supports orphaned and vulnerable children with education, healthcare, nutrition, and psychosocial care. We work to ensure every child grows in a safe and nurturing environment.

stats.label: An estimated 153 million children worldwide are orphans (UNICEF)
Of the 153 million orphans worldwide, 15.1 million children have lost both parents
66 million primary school-aged children attend classes hungry across the developing world (WHO)

props.title: United Hands Relief Orphan Sponsorship
props.content: In a split second, you can transform an orphan's life. Help children learn, be happy, and thrive.

props.title: Gaza Daily Kitchen
props.content: Providing daily nutritious meals to orphaned children and vulnerable families in Gaza to ensure they have access to food security and proper nutrition.

props.title: Help Protect Children and Empower Families
props.content: Your support allows UHR to provide comprehensive care and support to orphaned and vulnerable children, ensuring they grow up in safe and nurturing environments.

title: Education
subtitle: Access to Learning and Self-Reliance
tagline: UHR Education Program: Building Futures Through Learning
description: UHR provides access to quality education, school supplies, and learning resources. UHR offers vocational training opportunities to equip youth and adults with the skills needed for self-reliance and success.

hero.title: Education
hero.heading: Building Futures Through Learning
hero.overlayText: Providing access to quality education and vocational training to empower youth and adults.

props.title: Building Futures Through Learning
props.content: UHR provides access to quality education, school supplies, and learning resources. We offer vocational training opportunities to equip youth and adults with the skills needed for self-reliance and success.

items.title: Shipments of Books
items.description: Providing educational books and learning materials to schools and communities in need.

items.title: School Supplies and Backpacks
items.description: Distributing essential school supplies and backpacks to children in vulnerable communities.

items.title: Teacher Training
items.description: Training and supporting teachers to improve the quality of education.

items.title: Established Schools
items.description: Built and established schools in Gaza to provide education to children in conflict zones.

items.title: Computer Centers
items.description: Established computer centers in Gaza and Bangladesh to provide digital literacy and technical skills training.

stats.label: Children aged 5-12 can't read, write, or count
Girls are out of school, globally
People could be lifted out of poverty through basic reading skills

props.quote: Education can be the catalyst needed to pull families and communities out of the cycle of poverty. Knowledge gives children the power to dream of a better future and the confidence needed to pursue a full education, which in turn will help generations to come.
focusAreas: Providing access to quality education for all children
Equipping youth and adults with vocational skills

content.paragraph: In partnership with local NGOs, UHR sponsors the tuition of Palestinian students in Gaza and the West Bank where young people are eager to further their education but face financial barriers.
Access to education not only empowers youth but also opens doors to meaningful opportunities, helping them build a brighter future for themselves and their communities.
Your support can help us offer the invaluable gift of education to students who are motivated and capable, yet unable to afford tuition on their own.

For many children in vulnerable communities, returning to school is not guaranteed. Through the UHR Back to School Campaign, we provide school supplies, uniforms, and learning materials to help students start the year ready to learn.
Your support ensures that children — especially girls, displaced students, and those in crisis-affected areas — have the tools they need to succeed.

props.title: Help Build Futures Through Education
props.content: Your support allows UHR to provide quality education and vocational training to youth and adults, empowering them to build better futures for themselves and their communities.

title: Faith-based Giving
subtitle: Bringing Relief & Joy
tagline: Fulfill Your Sacred Duty. Share the Blessing.
description: UHR provides seasonal support to bring relief and joy to families facing hardship. This includes Ramadan food baskets, Eid gifts, Qurbani meat distribution, and Thanksgiving assistance, helping communities celebrate these occasions even in difficult times.

hero.title: Faith-based Giving
hero.heading: Fulfill Your Sacred Duty. Share the Blessing.
hero.overlayText: Providing seasonal support to help families celebrate important occasions with dignity and joy.

props.title: Fulfill Your Sacred Duty. Share the Blessing.
props.content: UHR provides seasonal support to bring relief and joy to families facing hardship. This includes Ramadan food baskets, Eid gifts, Qurbani meat distribution, and Thanksgiving assistance, helping communities celebrate these occasions even in difficult times.

props.title: Bring Hope, Share Qurbani: Join Hands with UHR

content.paragraph: Qurbani, an act of worship, exemplifies the spirit of sacrifice and gratitude towards the blessings we enjoy.
UHR is committed to empowering the most vulnerable communities through the spirit of unity and the strength of humanity.
This Qurbani season, we are making a tangible difference in the lives of struggling families across 13 countries globally.

props.title: Ramadan: Extend Your Hands to Transform Lives

content.paragraph: United Hands Relief invites you to share the blessings of Ramadan by giving hope, healing, and dignity to those in need.
Automate your donations through all 30 days of Ramadan to maximize your rewards.

props.title: Eid: Make A Difference With An Eid Gift!

content.paragraph: When you make a donation, you're doing much more than you might realize. You're not just giving $50; you're creating moments of joy, sparking smiles, and giving hope.
Your Donation will make an impact with:

content.listItem: New Clothes – Your contribution can help us purchase new outfits for kids who've had to make do with hand-me-downs.
Creating Memories – Your gift isn't just material. It's the joy a child feels when they are a part of the Eid celebrations.

props.title: Qurbani (Udhiya): Fulfill Your Sacred Duty. Share the Blessing.

content.paragraph: This Eid al-Adha, honor the Sunnah of Prophet Ibrahim (AS) by offering your Qurbani/Udhiya to families in need.
Pay your Zakat with UHR — Purify your possessions by setting aside a portion for the needy.
Zakat is based on income and the value of possessions. The common minimum amount for those who qualify is 2.5%, or 1/40 of a Muslim's total savings and wealth.
UHR is committed to empowering the most vulnerable communities through the spirit of unity and the strength of humanity.
This season, we are making a tangible difference in the lives of struggling families globally.

props.title: Fulfill Your Faith-Based Giving
props.content: Your support allows UHR to provide seasonal relief and joy to families in need, helping them celebrate important occasions with dignity and hope.

title: Livelihoods & Women Empowerment
subtitle: Empowering Communities to Thrive
description: UHR focuses on empowering vulnerable communities by helping individuals and families build sustainable livelihoods through vocational training, small business support, and sustainable farming initiatives.

hero.title: Livelihoods & Women Empowerment
hero.heading: Breaking the Cycle of Poverty
hero.overlayText: Empowering communities through sustainable livelihoods and women's economic independence.

props.title: Breaking the Cycle of Poverty
props.content: UHR focuses on empowering vulnerable communities by helping individuals and families build sustainable livelihoods through vocational training, small business support, and sustainable farming initiatives.

content.paragraph: Bangladesh is one of the world's top rice producers, with rice accounting for over 70% of the country's cropped area and providing the staple food for most of its population.
UHR implements rice farming projects to help vulnerable families rebuild their livelihoods and achieve food security.
Fish farming in Bangladesh—locally known as 'pisciculture'—is a major component of the country's agricultural economy and food security system.

listItems: Water Access – Inlet/outlet systems, pumps (if needed)
Fingerlings & Feed – Healthy stock and quality feed
Basic Equipment – Nets, feeders, water test kits
Training – For farm management and care
Licenses & Approvals – Land use and environmental clearance
Market Linkages – Buyers, transport, and cold storage if needed

stats.label: Workers were at risk of losing their livelihoods during the pandemic
Jobs lost in the second quarter of the pandemic
Income losses expected in developing countries due to the pandemic (UNDP)

initiatives.title: Fruit & Vegetable Stands
initiatives.description: Support for small-scale vendors to sell fresh produce, creating income opportunities and promoting healthy diets in local communities.

initiatives.title: Fish Farming
initiatives.description: Training and resources for aquaculture, enabling families to produce and sell fish, improving both nutrition and household income.

initiatives.title: Rice Farming
initiatives.description: Assistance for smallholder farmers to improve rice cultivation, boosting yields, incomes, and food security.

initiatives.title: Chicken Farms
initiatives.description: Provision of poultry, feed, and training to establish small chicken farms for egg and meat production.

initiatives.title: Dairy Product Stores
initiatives.description: Small shops offering milk, yogurt, and other dairy products, supporting family incomes and local nutrition.

initiatives.title: Street Food Stands
initiatives.description: Training and equipment for entrepreneurs to prepare and sell local street foods, boosting income while preserving cultural heritage.

initiatives.title: Juice Bars
initiatives.description: Set-up assistance for juice kiosks that provide fresh, nutritious beverages, supporting livelihoods and community health.

initiatives.title: Mini Supermarkets
initiatives.description: Micro-retail stores offering essential groceries, giving entrepreneurs steady income and communities convenient access to necessities.

initiatives.title: Sewing Machine Training Programs
initiatives.description: Skills development and sewing machine provision for tailoring businesses, empowering women and youth toward economic independence.

initiatives.title: Computer Training Centers
initiatives.description: Facilities offering digital skills courses, increasing employment opportunities in IT and modern workplaces.

initiatives.title: Hair Salons
initiatives.description: Vocational training and start-up support for hairdressing businesses, empowering both men and women to gain financial stability.

initiatives.title: Rickshaw Taxi Services
initiatives.description: Support for purchasing and operating pedal or motorized rickshaws, providing affordable local transport and steady income.

initiatives.title: Tuk Tuk Businesses
initiatives.description: Assistance to launch tuk tuk transport services, creating stable employment and connecting communities to markets and services.

props.title: Help Empower Communities Through Livelihoods
props.content: Your support allows UHR to create sustainable livelihoods and empower women, helping communities break the cycle of poverty and build brighter futures.
